project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) - React frontend + Express backend
build_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
verification_instructions: Build both frontend and backend with tsc/vite to confirm no compile errors
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet access. No running database available for integration testing. Validation is via TypeScript compilation.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Code follows existing inline styles pattern in React components.
key_patterns: Backend controllers in backend/src/controllers/*.controller.ts, frontend pages in frontend/src/pages/*.tsx, hooks in frontend/src/hooks/index.ts, API service in frontend/src/services/api.ts. Components use inline styles (no CSS modules). Backend uses Express with req.user!.care_home_id pattern.
directory_structure: backend/src/controllers/ - Express route handlers; backend/src/routes/index.ts - route registration; frontend/src/pages/ - React page components; frontend/src/hooks/index.ts - React Query hooks; frontend/src/services/api.ts - Axios API client
